title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
text: Middle East escalation drives safe-haven demand — JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). USD/JPY at 158.81; safe-haven bid competes with 450bp Fed-BoJ carry differential. Risk-off flow historically unwinds JPY shorts — watch 157.00 as the first technical level on a sustained risk-off move.

title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
text: HV30 at 6.5%, ATM IV (FXE chain) at 7.8% — options pricing a 1.3 vol-pt premium over realized. 25d RR at −0.08: mild put skew despite the bullish price trend — market hedging rather than chasing. title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
text: BoE 4.50% vs Fed 3.75% — 75bp GBP carry premium supports the pair structurally. GBP LF net long +28,426, AM −90,229; positioning aligned with the carry read. GBP/USD at 1.3538, mid-range; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.

title: AUD/NZD — Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/NZD at 1.2183 — retail heavily positioned, 91% SHORT in AUD/NZD. Contrarian signal suggests potential for a squeeze. Watch for a move above 1.2200 to confirm.
